steps.t: Kotheret Glint-grin told you about the rumoured treasure. Whether the treasure is real, she cannot say. It may have been buried somewhere in Bax Garâk…
You have discovered the possible location of the treasure cache. You should dig into the sand mound.
You've discovered what appears to be the treasure Kotheret told you about. You should try to open it.
Trying to open the treasure chest caused an angry shade to attack you. Now that you've vanquished it, you should try to open the chest again.
The contents of the treasure were more troubling than valuable: an intact skull, and a metallic tooth like Kotheret's. You should return to her in Mâr…
